name: English Toffee Frosting
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 tbsp Amaretto or other almond-flavored liqueur
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the 5 English toffee-flavored candy bars and set aside.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together the crushed toffee, amaretto liqueur, and flaked coconut.
3. Pour this mixture into the thawed frozen whipped topping.
4. Gently fold all ingredients together until well combined.
Yield: about 4-1/2 cups.
